sp_widget.description: 2.7 STRY0104983 - Stretch- Technical Debt - Update CSS to organize into proper hierarchy of CSS.
sp_widget.name: Tasker States Progress Bar
sp_widget.template:
{{data.nDraft.diplayValue}}% Draft
{{data.nWaiting.diplayValue}}% Waiting
{{data.nUnassigned.diplayValue}}% Unassigned
{{data.nAssigned.diplayValue}}% Assigned
{{data.nAccepted.diplayValue}}% Accepted
{{data.nRejected.diplayValue}}% Rejected
{{data.nWorkScheduled.diplayValue}}% Scheduled
{{data.nInProgress.diplayValue}}% In Progress
{{data.nInReview.diplayValue}}% In Review
{{data.nRework.diplayValue}}% Rework
{{data.nCompleted.diplayValue}}% Completed
{{data.nCanceled.diplayValue}}% Canceled
{{data.nIncompleted.diplayValue}}% Incompleted
${This Task has no Subtasks}
